items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Photo documentation linked to signature (before/after work)', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for photo documentation, yet it lacks concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm its implementation. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding whether this requirement is satisfied.
